items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #2' aims to confirm the behavior of the system when a customer confuses their view as a customer versus a provider. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates how this scenario is tested or validated. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include specific checks or validations related to this confusion, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement satisfaction.
